subcodes.title: Li-Akhiri’l-Mu’min
subcodes.first_line: Verily, I am God, no God is there but Me. I have created all things by My command, and whatsoever is other than Me is My creation. Say: O My creation! Worship Me alone. Indeed, I have been from all eternity the Ancient of Days, before and after [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. اننی انا الله لا اله الا انا قد خلقت کل شیء بامری و ان ما دونی خلقی قل ان یا خلقی ایای فاعبدون اننی قد کنت ازلاً قدیماً من قبل و من بعد
subcodes.subjects: @creation of the world, @chastisement and requital, @justice and wrath of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
